chapter_title: 真人感窗口人像 RealPantyhose 测试

panels.scene_description: near-real full-body portrait of an East Asian woman squatting by a bright window in a red dress, sheer black pantyhose, and red heels

resolved_prompt.positive: beautiful East Asian woman, long brown-black hair, delicate facial proportions, brown eyes, natural lips, realistic eyelashes, large bright window, grey curtain, soft daylight, wooden floor, indoor natural light, airy apartment interior, full-body composition, squatting pose, looking back toward camera, clearly wearing a fitted long-sleeve red dress made of visible red fabric, dress fully covering torso, waist and hips, black color RealPantyhose, one continuous sheer black pantyhose layer from waist to ankle, seamless black pantyhose over hips, thighs, knees and calves, clearly visible red ankle-strap high heels with red shoe body and red heel, soft smile, realistic skin, realistic knees and hands, bright window rim light, grey curtains, clean wood floor, shallow depth of field, natural feminine pose, very close to real photo, clothed fashion portrait, no fabric draped around body, elegant fashion photo finish, photorealistic, realistic skin texture, realistic skin pores, cinematic daylight, soft backlight, realistic depth of field, premium texture detail, realistic photography look
resolved_prompt.negative: cartoon, 2d, painting, illustration, overprocessed beauty skin, plastic skin, low quality, worst quality, blurry, deformed anatomy, extra fingers, text, watermark, office props, smartphone, empty limbs, duplicate body parts, broken hands, anime face, heavy cel shading, exaggerated giant eyes, posterized skin, oversharpened edges, white cloth, cream cloth, beige cloth, blanket, towel, shawl, wrap dress made from loose fabric, nude shoulder wrap, exposed shoulders, off-shoulder cream garment, white dress, ivory dress, bathrobe, thighhighs, thigh-highs, stockings, stocking tops, garter belt, exposed upper thigh, visible thigh band, black shoes, black pumps, dark heels, fully black footwear

resolved_render.notes: Photoreal hosiery benchmark: keep the r06 near-real baseline, add RealPantyhose at moderate strength, and explicitly use its trigger word to test whether it can improve continuous sheer black pantyhose without destabilizing the dress.

narration: 这一版开始让专门的丝袜 LoRA 接管，不再只靠 prompt 硬拧。
